title: Email & activities template - date format
excerpt:
When we insert date columns value in email, Monday choose by default to convert the value in english like that: November 3 2023 
It’s not ok when we want to reach french customer for exemple. Please provide us the abilit…

posts.author: ckornaros (Christos Kornaros)
posts.cookedHtml:
When we insert date columns value in email, Monday choose by default to convert the value in english like that: November 3 2023
It’s not ok when we want to reach french customer for exemple. Please provide us the ability to choose the way we want to format our date
